title: PlanAuditor-Planner Replan Loop Cap
description: Validates that Orchestrator caps the PlanAuditor→Planner revision loop at 2 iterations

inputs.label: first-revision-succeeds
inputs.description: PlanAuditor finds issues, Planner revises, PlanAuditor approves on second pass

inputs.label: two-revisions-then-approve
inputs.description: PlanAuditor finds issues twice, Planner revises twice, PlanAuditor approves on third pass

inputs.label: cap-exceeded-escalates
inputs.description: After 2 revision rounds, if PlanAuditor still rejects, escalate to user

iteration_3_would_be.note: Orchestrator does NOT run a 3rd revision. Instead, escalates.

expected_behavior.user_sees: PlanAuditor findings from both rounds plus Planner revision attempts

assertions: Maximum 2 PlanAuditor→Planner revision rounds before escalation
Each revision round sends PlanAuditor findings to Planner as revision context
If PlanAuditor approves within 2 rounds, pipeline proceeds to ACTING
If 2 rounds exhausted without approval, Orchestrator escalates to user
Escalation includes accumulated findings from all rounds
